_comment_coOwnership: Co-ownership is peer-to-peer and independent of role. ANY user can assign a desk they booked to another person; both then appear in the booking's owners[] and can modify/cancel/check-in. accessRights only gates booking-on-behalf at scale, flat access, and admin override.

carbon._comment: kg CO2e per km, one-way. Round trips are 2x. A booked+attended office day implies a commute; a day NOT booked implies remote (zero commute emissions). Saving = avoided commute emissions on remote days.
carbon._comment_baseline: Per-head fixed office overhead (heating, lighting, kitchen) attributed to an attended day; used for office-level planning, not per-user commute savings.
